projectDescription: An open-source toolkit for building AI-powered smart glasses apps that see, hear, and guide wearers in real time, starting with Rokid Glasses.
keyFeatures: Rokid Glasses Android SDK with HUD layout, touchpad input, and camera/mic access patterns
WebRTC media streaming from glasses to backend services via aiortc and Stream WebRTC
OpenAI Realtime API integration for low-latency voice-and-vision AI sessions
Overshoot VLM continuous inference for proactive, camera-driven perception loops
RF-DETR object detection with annotated frame injection into realtime model conversations
Offline Vosk voice commands mirroring touchpad gestures
Agent skill for Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor to build glasses apps autonomously
Runnable end-to-end examples covering assembly assistants, speedrun timers, and coaching apps
publicApiSurface: npx skills add RealComputer/GlassKit (agent skill install)
skills/glasskit/assets/rokid-hello-world (Android starter template)
ScreenController (base class for Rokid HUD screens)
HudViewportLayout / RokidHudViewportLayout (480x640 HUD wrapper)
NavigationInputMapper (touchpad KEYCODE_ENTER / DPAD / OnBackPressedCallback mapping)
VoiceCommandRecognizer (Vosk offline command words: select, back, next, previous)
POST /session (backend SDP broker for OpenAI Realtime)
POST /vision/session (backend WebRTC receiver for object detection / Overshoot)
WebSocket control channel (hud.state, session.start, session.stop events)
DataChannel vision-events / oai-events (normalized app-state JSON)
OpenAIRealtimeClient.kt (Android WebRTC client for OpenAI Realtime audio + data channel)
BackendVisionClient.kt (Android WebRTC client for camera-to-backend vision streaming)
OvershootSessionClient.kt (Android WebRTC client for Overshoot VLM inference)
BackendControlClient.kt (Android WebSocket client for backend session control)
Detection / DetectionSnapshot (normalized object detection result types)
session_manager.py (Python backend session lifecycle and wiring layer)
session_workflow.py (Python proactive workflow state machine)
CameraX back-camera binding pattern (1024x768 @ 15fps, landscape-to-portrait)
AudioRecord / JavaAudioDeviceModule Rokid mic configuration (16kHz mono, USAGE_MEDIA)
SDP normalization helper (normalize_sdp / normalizeSdp)
